data.description: A deal was struck on April 2, 2026, by A/S Delfi, a fully-owned subsidiary of AS Ekspress Grupp, to acquire 100% of the shares of the training firm SIA Baltijas Datoru Akadēmija from tech company SIA Tet.

data.title: Bitcoin dropped as US dollar reached its highest level since mid-2025, prompting fears of "new lows" in crypto assets.
data.description: Bitcoin experienced a decline due to recent developments between the United States and Iran. Analysts have cautioned that a strengthening US dollar may lead to further drops in the cryptocurrency market and other risky assets.

data.title: SpaceX, founded by Elon Musk, seeks IPO with valuation exceeding $1.75 trillion, rivaling top tech companies in US.
data.description: SpaceX's valuation surpassing $1.75 trillion would position the company among the top public firms in the US, outpacing numerous leading tech companies based on current market valuations.

data.title: Sanctions on Venezuela's acting leader, Delcy Rodríguez, lifted by US. Allows business with US firms and chance to meet Trump.
data.description: If sanctions are lifted, Delcy Rodríguez, who is currently serving as the country's interim leader, would be able to engage in trade with American companies and possibly hold discussions with President Trump.

data.title: Zoomlion Reports 2025 Results With International Revenue Approaching 60% of Total
data.description: Zoomlion Heavy Industry Science & Technology Co., Ltd. ("Zoomlion" or "the Company"; 1157.HK) recently disclosed its 2025 annual results, showcasing significant growth fueled by global expansion and diversified operations. The company reported a revenue of RMB 52.107 billion, marking a substantial 14.58% increase from the previous year. Additionally, net profit attributable to shareholders rose to RMB 4.858 billion, an impressive growth of 38.01%. International revenue saw a noteworthy surge of 30.52% to reach RMB 30.515 billion, constituting 58.56% of the total revenue. This emphasizes the crucial role played by the Company's international presence and varied business portfolio in driving its growth trajectory. In 2025, Zoomlion saw positive developments in its core equipment sectors, with its concrete machinery, mobile crane machinery, and construction hoisting machinery divisions experiencing growth in global markets. The export sales from these segments collectively increased by over 20%, underscoring the company’s success in expanding its newer growth areas alongside its established businesses.

data.title: Solita Launches AI Agent Orchestrator for Enterprise Software Development: Solita RoadCrewAO™
data.description: A new tool named Solita RoadCrew Agentic Orchestrator (Solita RoadCrewAO™) has been unveiled by the AI and data transformation firm Solita in Tampere, Finland. This multi-agent software is tailored for autonomous, high-level software development in organizations. Solita RoadCrewAO™ revolutionizes software creation, construction, and management in intricate business settings. By coordinating specific processes, it facilitates smarter, quicker, and more flexible software development. This launch signifies a notable advancement in the industry's technology landscape, offering enhanced capabilities for developers and businesses.

data.title: Trump's Speech Skipped 'Ceasefire' And 'Peace', Leaving Polymarket Traders Who Bet Against These Words Profiting Big Time
data.description: Before President Donald Trump's highly anticipated televised address, the word-mention prediction market was active. Bettors had placed over $100,000 in wagers on the words "Ceasefire/Peace Deal" on Polymarket, expecting a de-escalatory stance given Trump's hints of nearing the end of the military campaign against Iran. However, Trump surprised many by stating that the war would continue until all objectives were met, threatening significant strikes on Iran if a deal wasn't reached promptly. Interestingly, both "ceasefire" and "peace" were notably absent from his speech. A user named Dragontree had made a substantial bet, purchasing 9,741 "No" shares when the odds were at 35%. The winners and losers in this prediction market saw dramatic shifts based on Trump's address. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
OIL PRICES INCREASE DUE TO TRUMP'S WARNINGS ABOUT IRAN.

data.title: Bending Spoons renews tech scholarship for women with €100,000 commitment
data.description: A scholarship opportunity for women in computer science has been announced by Bending Spoons in Milan. The program is open for applications and will grant twenty awards valued at €5,000 each to students across Europe.
